subcodes.first_line: O Lord! All praise be unto Thee, for the Daystar of divine favors hath dawned from the horizon of pardon and forgiveness, hath shed its radiance and dispelled the darkness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب لک الحمد بما اشرق نیر الاحسان من افق العفو و الغفران و اضاء و ازال ظلام
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for forgiveness
